creator: kami@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Emmanuel Vadot from comment #1)

I suffer from the same issue and recompiled it.

I'm running stable/13 fc15d5bf11099bf04d62cf8fdd5b8ab413a61cea. After reverting commit 50f61166f7b911a7807b3cb76d0f382a13fbafcd and rebuilding drm-kmod again, it is restored into working condition.
